title: Figura Jade Name
description: A mod that renders the figura name in the jade overlay
body:
This mod provides a way to change the name shown in Jade via the Figura script, making it so the Figura name shows up instead.  

When a name is provided using 
```
nameplate.ENTITY
```
 or 
```
nameplate.ALL
```
 in Figura, it changes the nameplate name to that name, or when the nameplate is hidden, it won't show a name at all.
